titleStmt.title: SII 24.316: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 316. (A.R. No. 86 of 1937-38.) ĀRYABHAṬṬĀḶ-VĀŚAL, INNER WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of cows and lands and a silver vessel by Śivandeḻundāṉ-Sāmanttaṉār for providing food and milk offerings to the god at the close of the services in the night. The details of date viz., Śaka 1327, Pārthiva, Aṟpaśi 13, correspond to A.D. 1405, October 11, Sunday. The occasion of the grant is stated to be the lunar eclipse, the year and month being not specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śakābdam 1000 3 100 2 10 7 mel cellāniṉṟa pārtthivavaruṣam Aṟpaci mātam
10 3 tiyati perumāḷ śrīraṅganātaṟku pālamutu neyamutu candrādityavaraiyum naṭatta
somagrahaṇapuṇyakālattile takkāṟkutakkāṉ rākuttamiṇṭaṉ civanteḻuntāṉ
cāmantaṉār kuṭutta pacu Uru 100 kaṉṟu Uru 9 10 5 Āka Uru 100 9 10 5- Ituvum tai mātam 2 10 1�
mutalāka Irāttiṟi tiruppaṇi maṭaṅkukiṟa tecakālattile perumāḷ Amutu ceytaruḷattakkatāka civanteḻuntāṉ cāmantaṉār AvatāramākaRead avasarataḷikaikku
civanteḻuntāṉ cāmantaṉār kuṭutta veḷḷittaḷikai Oṉṟukku Iṭai 1000 2 10 pala Itukku ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl Amutupaṭi patakkukku ṉāṭṭuk kālāl nellu Irutūṇi
kaṟi Amutum tirumālaiyum naṭakkaikku koṇṭu kuṭutta Eṭuttakai Aḻakiyanayiṉār tirumaṭappaḷḷikku kiḻakku Akaḷaṅkaṉ tirumatiḷukku teṟku tirumaṅkai Āḻvār tirumatiḷukku vaṭa
kku Āyirakkāl tirumaṇṭapattukku meṟku nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa Irācavipāṭaṉāl kuḻi 7 10 5 kku vilaippaṭa poṉ 10 . Ivaikaḷ candrādityavaraiyum naṭakka §
Digital edition of SII 24.316 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
